parameters.query:
SELECT *
FROM {{ $('Get Initial Data').item.json.schema }}.n8n_chat_histories
WHERE fec_registro < NOW() - INTERVAL '4 days'
ORDER BY session_id asc, id asc;

INSERT INTO {{ $('Get Initial Data').first().json.schema }}.n8n_chat_histories_bkup
  (session_id,message, old_id, fec_registro)
  select session_id,message, id , fec_registro
  from {{ $('Get Initial Data').first().json.schema }}.n8n_chat_histories
  WHERE session_id='{{ $json.session_id }}'
  and id ={{ $json.id }}

SELECT 
    (SELECT value FROM {{ $json.schema }}.info_business WHERE concept = 'CapacidadReservas' LIMIT 1) as "capacidadreservas",
    (SELECT value FROM {{ $json.schema }}.info_business WHERE concept = 'SKUEjemplo' LIMIT 1) as "SKUEjemplo"
  ;

value.codigo_reserva: ={{ $('Info Negocio').first().json.SKUEjemplo.split('-')[0] }}-{{ new Date().toLocaleDateString('sv-SE', { timeZone: 'America/Argentina/Buenos_Aires' }).slice(2).replace(/-/g, '') }}-{{ Array.from({length: 4}, () => String.fromCharCode(65 + Math.floor(Math.random() * 26))).join('') }}
